seo.title: About Us
seo.description: IrisPro is a protection technology company founded in Malaysia, engineered for the intense sun and unique climate of ASEAN. We create high-performance window film solutions that protect people, interiors and building value—every day.

data.subhead: IrisPro is a protection technology company founded in Malaysia, engineered for the intense sun and unique climate of ASEAN. We create high-performance window film solutions that protect people, interiors and building value—every day.

media.alt: Sunset city skyline reflected in a protected office-tower façade

poster.alt: Video: the IrisPro journey — headquarters building

pillars.description: Developed to withstand extreme heat, high UV and humidity.

data.heading: Our Patented Technology
data.lede: Innovation is at the heart of everything we do. Our patented UV+420™ Optical Solar Film and 6-Layer Hotmelt™ Base Film deliver complete protection beyond UV380, blocking harmful UV and HEV blue light while rejecting solar heat effectively.

categories.title: UV+420™ Optical Technology
categories.description: Blocks UV400 and HEV Blue Light 380–420nm for better skin and eye protection.

categories.title: 6-Layer Hotmelt™ Base Film
categories.description: Stronger, clearer and more durable with advanced protection in one integrated film.

steps.title: Expanded to commercial and architectural market.
Awarded Asia Automotive Award – Asia Best Tint Brand.

_unplaced.note: Copy from the about screen with no expressible section field. Preserved verbatim for the client / a future prose section type.
our-story-prose: IrisPro was born from one simple belief:
Protection should be better, longer lasting and made for ASEAN.
We saw a need for window films that truly block harmful UV, reduce heat effectively and stand strong in our hot, humid climate.
Through continuous research, advanced materials and strict quality control, we developed patented technologies that deliver complete protection beyond what ordinary films can do.
Today, IrisPro is trusted by homeowners, businesses, architects and institutions across the region to create cooler, safer and more sustainable environments.
_unplaced.our-promise-body: We are committed to creating innovative protection solutions that improve lives, enhance comfort and build a sustainable future for generations to come.
_unplaced.milestone-2024-plus: The final milestone reads '2024+' on screen; LearningStep.number is numeric, so the '+' cannot be expressed — preserved here.
_unplaced.hero-benefit-pairs: Hero benefit chips are two-part on screen (Health / For People etc.); BenefitItem has a single label, so the pairs are joined with an em dash.
